impact: This gives PP&D deterministic coverage for online trade permit purchase review states before any live DevHub automation, including semantic selectors, required fields, fee review, validation, save-for-later behavior, and exact stop gates for purchase confirmation.
summary: Add a redacted mocked DevHub online trade permit purchase review fixture plus focused validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-125: Add a mocked DevHub workflow snapshot fixture for online trade permit purchase review that records semantic selectors, required fields, fee-review state, validation messages, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates using only redacted values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
